2025-10-19 14:15:46.703 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (6ms) [Parameters=[@__fiveMinutesAgo_0='?' (DbType = DateTime2)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[InstallationDate], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[Type], [d].[ZoneId], [z].[Id], [z].[Area], [z].[BuildingId], [z].[Name], [z].[Type], [e0].[Id], [e0].[Current], [e0].[DeviceId], [e0].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e0].[Temperature], [e0].[Timestamp], [e0].[Voltage]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0
) AS [e0] ON [d].[Id] = [e0].[DeviceId]
WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [z].[Id], [e0].[Timestamp] DESC

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[InstallationDate], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[Type], [d].[ZoneId], [z].[Id], [z].[Area], [z].[BuildingId], [z].[Name], [z].[Type], [e0].[Id], [e0].[Current], [e0].[DeviceId], [e0].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e0].[Temperature], [e0].[Timestamp], [e0].[Voltage]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0
) AS [e0] ON [d].[Id] = [e0].[DeviceId]
WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [z].[Id], [e0].[Timestamp] DESC

END AS [Type], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM [Alerts] AS [a]
WHERE [a].[CreatedAt] >= @__start_0 AND [a].[CreatedAt] <= @__end_1 AND [a].[IsRead] = @__isRead_Value_2
2025-10-19 15:32:53.770 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (12ms) [Parameters=[@__start_0='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @__end_1='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @__isRead_Value_2='?' (DbType = Boolean), @__p_3='?' (DbType = Int32), @__p_4='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [a0].[Id], [d].[Name] AS [DeviceName], [z].[Name] AS [ZoneName], CASE [a0].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'HighConsumption'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Anomaly'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Wastage'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'DeviceOffline'
    ELSE CAST([a0].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [AlertType], [a0].[Message], [a0].[Severity], CASE
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 1 THEN N'Info'
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'Warning'
    ELSE N'Critical'
END AS [SeverityLabel], CASE
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 1 THEN N'🔵'
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'🟡'
    ELSE N'🔴'
END AS [Icon], [a0].[CreatedAt], [a0].[IsRead]
FROM (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[DeviceId], [a].[IsRead], [a].[Message], [a].[Severity], [a].[Type]
    FROM [Alerts] AS [a]
    WHERE [a].[CreatedAt] >= @__start_0 AND [a].[CreatedAt] <= @__end_1 AND [a].[IsRead] = @__isRead_Value_2
    ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_3 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_4 ROWS ONLY
) AS [a0]
INNER JOIN [Devices] AS [d] ON [a0].[DeviceId] = [d].[Id]

    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'Warning'

END AS [SeverityLabel], CASE
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 1 THEN N'🔵'

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [b].[Id], [b].[Name]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]

    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [b].[Id], [b].[Name]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Buildings] AS [b] ON [z].[BuildingId] = [b].[Id]
ORDER BY [z].[Name], [d].[Name]

    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[InstallationDate], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[Type], [d].[ZoneId], [z].[Id], [z].[Area], [z].[BuildingId], [z].[Name], [z].[Type], [e0].[Id], [e0].[Current], [e0].[DeviceId], [e0].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e0].[Temperature], [e0].[Timestamp], [e0].[Voltage]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0
) AS [e0] ON [d].[Id] = [e0].[DeviceId]
WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [z].[Id], [e0].[Timestamp] DESC
2025-10-19 20:37:35.205 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (2ms) [Parameters=[@__device_Id_0='?' (DbType = Int32), @__AddMinutes_1='?' (DbType = DateTime2)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Alerts] AS [a]
        WHERE [a].[DeviceId] = @__device_Id_0 AND [a].[Type] = 4 AND [a].[CreatedAt] >= @__AddMinutes_1) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END

FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0
) AS [e0] ON [d].[Id] = [e0].[DeviceId]

SELECT [a0].[Id], [d].[Name] AS [DeviceName], [z].[Name] AS [ZoneName], CASE [a0].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'HighConsumption'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Anomaly'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Wastage'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'DeviceOffline'
    ELSE CAST([a0].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [AlertType], [a0].[Message], [a0].[Severity], CASE
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 1 THEN N'Info'
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'Warning'
    ELSE N'Critical'
END AS [SeverityLabel], CASE
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 1 THEN N'🔵'
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'🟡'
    ELSE N'🔴'
END AS [Icon], [a0].[CreatedAt], [a0].[IsRead]
FROM (

2025-10-19 21:01:28.524 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (19ms) [Parameters=[@__start_0='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @__end_1='?' (DbType = DateTime2), @__isRead_Value_2='?' (DbType = Boolean), @__p_3='?' (DbType = Int32), @__p_4='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [a0].[Id], [d].[Name] AS [DeviceName], [z].[Name] AS [ZoneName], CASE [a0].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'HighConsumption'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Anomaly'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Wastage'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'DeviceOffline'
    ELSE CAST([a0].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [AlertType], [a0].[Message], [a0].[Severity], CASE
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 1 THEN N'Info'
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'Warning'
    ELSE N'Critical'
END AS [SeverityLabel], CASE
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 1 THEN N'🔵'
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'🟡'
    ELSE N'🔴'
END AS [Icon], [a0].[CreatedAt], [a0].[IsRead]
FROM (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[DeviceId], [a].[IsRead], [a].[Message], [a].[Severity], [a].[Type]
    FROM [Alerts] AS [a]
    WHERE [a].[CreatedAt] >= @__start_0 AND [a].[CreatedAt] <= @__end_1 AND [a].[IsRead] = @__isRead_Value_2
    ORDER BY [a].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_3 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_4 ROWS ONLY

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [b].[Id], [b].[Name]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]

INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0
) AS [e0] ON [d].[Id] = [e0].[DeviceId]
WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [z].[Id], [e0].[Timestamp] DESC

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [b].[Id], [b].[Name]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]

    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [z].[Id], [z].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(@__p_0) [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC
) AS [e0]
INNER JOIN [Devices] AS [d] ON [e0].[DeviceId] = [d].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
ORDER BY [e0].[Timestamp] DESC

SELECT [e0].[Id], [e0].[Timestamp], [e0].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e0].[Voltage], [e0].[Current], [e0].[Temperature], [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [z].[Id], [z].[Name]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(@__p_0) [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC
) AS [e0]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [b].[Id], [b].[Name]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]

    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'Warning'
    ELSE N'Critical'

2025-10-19 22:57:09.927 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[@__device_Id_0='?' (DbType = Int32), @__AddMinutes_1='?' (DbType = DateTime2)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Alerts] AS [a]
        WHERE [a].[DeviceId] = @__device_Id_0 AND [a].[Type] = 4 AND [a].[CreatedAt] >= @__AddMinutes_1) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END
